description: US President Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening severe retaliation for its "bad behaviour" and considering new targets for "complete destruction." Trump claimed credit for Iran's apology to its neighbours following intense US-Israeli strikes. Meanwhile, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian apologised for attacks, though missile strikes continued, indicating internal divisions.

Despite the Pentagon's move, major cloud providers are backing Anthropic's commercial use.

description: Employees from major tech firms like Amazon, Google, and Microsoft are demanding their companies reject Pentagon contracts that could compromise AI safety guardrails.  The open letter, spearheaded by 'No Tech For Apartheid,' urges leaders to refuse demands that would allow mass surveillance and AI-powered weaponry without human oversight.

title: Sarpanch gunned down at Punjab gym, 3rd village head killed since Jan
description: A village sarpanch, Harwinder Singh, was fatally shot at his gym in Moga district by unidentified assailants. Police suspect personal rivalry, though the victim faced criminal cases. The incident has taken a political turn with relatives accusing an AAP MLA of threats, leading to a refusal for post-mortem until the MLA is named in the FIR.

title: UP headmistress gets foot massage from Class 5 students during school hours, suspended
description: A government primary school headmistress in Chitrakoot district has been suspended. A video showing a student giving her a foot massage during school hours went viral. The incident occurred at the Naya Bazar school. The headmistress denies the allegations, claiming the video is doctored. An inspection report led to her suspension.

title: JP Morgan CEO who’s against 'work from home' says 4-day workweek possible with AI
description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, previously skeptical of remote work, now sees AI as a potential game-changer, predicting it could shorten the work week to four days within decades. While acknowledging AI's capacity to boost productivity and improve work-life balance, Dimon also cautioned about potential job disruptions and urged proactive preparation for labor market shifts.
